titleEn: Jul 1NewsPig ProgressWrapping up June: What’s new in the world of pigs?Pig Progress reports on the latest business news and developments from the global pig industry.
titleZh: 六月全球猪业动态：从智能饲喂到AI监测，多项创新助力产业升级
summaryZh: 本文汇总了2025年6月全球养猪业的最新商业新闻与技术进展，涵盖Trouw Nutrition推出的仔猪训练棒Milkiwean ActiBar、Elanco发布的饲料配方在线计算器、FeedArmor对非洲猪瘟病毒替代株的灭活效果验证、Speria收购AI牲畜监测公司Optifarm、Alltech推出新型植物源性肠道健康产品并扩建实验室，以及Animistic与Blackhive的战略合作。这些创新聚焦于仔猪断奶过渡、饲料效率优化、生物安全防控、AI健康监测和供应链协同，为智慧畜牧从业者提供了从精准营养到数字化管理的实践参考。
featuredReason: 本文集中呈现了全球猪业在精准营养、生物安全、AI监测和供应链协同方面的最新商业动态，为智慧畜牧从业者提供了从技术选型到产业合作的多维度参考，尤其适合关注养猪业数字化转型和降本增效的读者。
contentFull: Wrapping up June: What’s new in the world of pigs?Pig Progress reports on the latest business news and developments from the global pig industry, including new piglet innovations from Trouw Nutrition, feed formulation tools from Elanco, feed biosecurity research around FeedArmor, AI-driven livestock monitoring via Speria and Optifarm, gut health and research expansion from Alltech, and a new industry partnership between Animistic and Blackhive. This and more.Natalie KinsleyFreelance journalistJul 1NewsTrouw Nutrition launches Milkiwean ActiBar for pigletsTrouw Nutrition has launched Milkiwean ActiBar, a piglet training bar designed to stimulate pre-weaning feed intake by encouraging natural rooting and chewing behaviour. The product aims to help piglets adapt more easily to solid feed, supporting gut development and reducing post-weaning stress.Elanco launches feed calculator for pigs and broilersElanco has launched a free online calculator to help pig nutritionists assess beta-mannan levels in diets. The tool estimates beta-mannan risk from feed ingredients and identifies whether the enzyme Hemicell™ XT could improve feed efficiency, gut health and overall pig performance.FeedArmor effective against ASFv surrogate virusIndependent research from the University of Minnesota has shown that FeedArmor can reduce levels of EhV, the industry-standard surrogate virus for African swine fever virus (ASFv), by 99.99% within 1 hour. FeedArmor uses a low-inclusion, patent-pending technology (2-6 lbs or 0.9-2.7 kg per tonne) designed to improve ease of use, worker safety and cost-effectiveness.Speria acquires livestock AI specialist OptifarmSperia has acquired UK-based Optifarm, a developer of AI-powered livestock monitoring technology. Optifarm’s systems analyse animal behaviour and environmental data to detect early health issues, helping producers make more proactive management decisions.Alltech launches pig gut health product and expands research capabilitiesAlltech has introduced Olerix, a new phytogenic blend designed to support gut health, feed efficiency, immunity and growth performance in pigs. The company has also expanded its EU Applications Laboratory in Ireland, strengthening research into sustainable agriculture, emissions reduction, nutrient management and renewable energy solutions for livestock farming.Animistic and Blackhive form strategic partnershipAnimal nutrition company Animistic and supply chain specialist Blackhive have announced a strategic partnership to combine animal nutrition expertise with global sourcing, procurement and distribution capabilities. The collaboration aims to help animal health and nutrition companies bring products to market more efficiently through streamlined product development, improved supply chain management and scalable commercialisation strategies.
translationZh:
**Trouw Nutrition推出仔猪用Milkiwean ActiBar**

Trouw Nutrition推出了Milkiwean ActiBar，这是一种仔猪训练棒，旨在通过鼓励自然的拱地和咀嚼行为来刺激断奶前的采食量。该产品旨在帮助仔猪更容易适应固体饲料，支持肠道发育并减少断奶后应激。

**Elanco发布猪和肉鸡饲料计算器**

Elanco发布了一款免费在线计算器，帮助猪营养师评估日粮中的β-甘露聚糖水平。该工具可根据饲料原料估算β-甘露聚糖风险，并判断酶制剂Hemicell™ XT是否能改善饲料效率、肠道健康和猪的整体生产性能。

**FeedArmor对非洲猪瘟病毒替代株有效**

明尼苏达大学的独立研究表明，FeedArmor可在1小时内将EhV（非洲猪瘟病毒行业标准替代株）水平降低99.99%。FeedArmor采用低添加量、专利待批技术（每吨2-6磅或0.9-2.7公斤），旨在提高易用性、工人安全性和成本效益。

**Speria收购牲畜AI专家Optifarm**

Speria收购了总部位于英国的Optifarm，后者是一家开发AI驱动牲畜监测技术的公司。Optifarm的系统分析动物行为和环境数据，以早期发现健康问题，帮助生产者做出更主动的管理决策。

**Alltech推出猪肠道健康产品并扩大研究能力**

Alltech推出了Olerix，这是一种新型植物源性混合物，旨在支持猪的肠道健康、饲料效率、免疫力和生长性能。该公司还扩建了位于爱尔兰的欧盟应用实验室，加强了对可持续农业、减排、养分管理和牲畜养殖可再生能源解决方案的研究。

**Animistic与Blackhive形成战略合作伙伴关系**

动物营养公司Animistic与供应链专家Blackhive宣布建立战略合作伙伴关系，将动物营养专业知识与全球采购、采购和分销能力相结合。该合作旨在通过简化产品开发、改善供应链管理和可扩展的商业化策略，帮助动物健康和营养公司更高效地将产品推向市场。
author: Natalie Kinsley
